title: Allow Owners to "Act As" Member, Viewer, or Guest
excerpt: I’d like to propose adding a button or toggle that would allow Owners to “act as” a Member, Viewer, or Guest to test out permission settings.

posts.author: Curt.McCluskey (Curt McCluskey)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to propose adding a button or toggle that would allow Owners to “act as” a Member, Viewer, or Guest to test out permission settings.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, I agree. This would be amazing!
